Book a Workshop

I am Justina Akua Owusuaa

Educator +
Web & Database Specialist

Based in Accra, Ghana. I specialize in teaching hands-on web development, databases, and complementary tech skills. My goal is to empower students to build modern, scalable, and responsive web applications.

Explore Experiences

About Me

Who Am I?

I am an experienced tech educator based in Accra, Ghana, with a passion for simplifying complex technical concepts. Over the years, I have helped hundreds of students transition into tech by teaching foundational to advanced web development and database management skills.

My core mission is to bridge the digital skills gap by delivering practical, project-based curriculum that prepares learners for the global tech industry. I thrive in classroom environments, coding bootcamps, and corporate training sessions.

© 2026 Justina Akua Owusuaa. Made with in Accra

×

Web Development Fundamentals

Accra Coding Academy / University of Ghana | Jan 2023 – Dec 2024

Introduced 80+ beginners to modern web development. Students built fully responsive personal websites from scratch.

Skills Taught:

  • HTML5, CSS3, Flexbox/Grid
  • JavaScript (ES6+)
  • Responsive Design
  • Git & GitHub
×

Frontend Frameworks Mastery

Online Bootcamp (Coursera Partner) + Local Workshops | Mar 2022 – Jun 2025

Taught advanced frontend development using popular frameworks. Students created interactive dashboards and e-commerce fronts.

Skills Taught:

  • React.js, Next.js
  • Tailwind CSS
  • State Management (Redux/Zustand)
  • Component Architecture
×

Backend Development with Node.js

Ghana Tech Institute | Sep 2021 – Present

Guided students in building scalable server-side applications and RESTful APIs.

Skills Taught:

  • Node.js, Express.js
  • REST APIs
  • Authentication (JWT)
  • Postman testing
×

Database Design & SQL Mastery

University of Ghana – Computer Science Department | Jan 2020 – Dec 2022

Delivered hands-on database courses where students designed and optimized real-world relational databases.

Skills Taught:

  • SQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL
  • Database Normalization
  • Joins, Indexing
  • Stored Procedures
×

NoSQL & Modern Database Applications

Freelance Corporate Training (Accra-based startups) | Jul 2023 – Present

Taught non-relational databases integrated with web apps. Students built full CRUD applications with real-time features.

Skills Taught:

  • MongoDB, Firebase
  • Mongoose ODM
  • Cloud Firestore
  • Data Modeling for NoSQL
×

Full-Stack Web Application Development (MERN)

Capstone Project Course – Accra Institute of Technology | Sep 2022 – Aug 2024

Final-year full-stack course; students completed end-to-end applications deployed to production.

Skills Taught:

  • MERN Stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js)
  • Deployment (Vercel/Netlify/Heroku)
  • API Integration
  • Performance Optimization
